title: Hiring Store Manager at Tupperware India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Tupperware India
jsonLd.description:
We at Tupperware India are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tupperware India:
Tupperware India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India!
